publishedAbstract: * After creating a noobaa backing store with ocs-storagecluster-ceph-rbd sc,the "access_key: '123',secret_key: 'abc'," messages are observed from the log of noobaa agent pod, is there any security risk? ~~~ $ oc logs mytest-noobaa-pod-a3b0c436:...... 2023-05-21T07:46:42.937760573Z May-21 7:46:42.937 [Agent/22] [L0] core.agent.agent_cli:: AGENTS NEW PATHS 1 2023-05-21T07:46:42.938834268Z May-21 7:46:42.938 [Agent/22] [L0] core.agent.agent_cli:: create_node_helper called with self.params {2023-05-21T07:46:42.938834268Z_: ['/usr/bin/node', '/root/node_modules/noobaa-core/src/agent/agent_cli'], 2023-05-21T07:46:42.938834268Z hostname: 'mytest-noobaa-pod-d5d0a885', 2023-05-21T07:46:42.938834268Z address: 'wss://noobaa-mgmt.openshift-storage.svc.cluster.local/', 2023-05-21T07:46:42.938834268Z routing_hint: 'INTERNAL', 2023-05-21T07:46:42.938834268Z system: 'noobaa', 2023-05-21T07:46:42.938834268Z create_node_token: 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiNjQyM2U1YTc3MmZkM2UwMDI5NmRjYWViIiwic3lzdGVtX2lkIjoiNjQyM2U1YTY3 MmZkM2UwMDI5NmRjYWRjIiwicm9sZSI6ImNyZWF0ZV9ub2RlIiwiZXh0cmEiOnsiYWdlbnRfY29uZmlnX2lkIjoiNjQ0Nzc0Y2VhZmZjZTEwMDI5MzcwY2ZmIn0sImF1dGhvcml6ZWRfYnkiOiJub29iYWEiLCJpYXQiOjE2ODI0MDQ1NT h9.UbKcYf_wVmWj4MTaujhQJNkH8OHGeKqpha-P0KK51do', 2023-05-21T07:46:42.938834268Z root_path: '/noobaa_storage', 2023-05-21T07:46:42.938834268Z access_key: '123', 2023-05-21T07:46:42.938834268Z secret_key: 'abc', 2023-05-21T07:46:42.938834268Z bucket: 'first.bucket', 2023-05-21T07:46:42.938834268Z host_id: '54db4740-c84e-49ed-8e01-3344567ba567', 2023-05-21T07:46:42.938834268Z ignore_drives: [], 2023-05-21T07:46:42.938834268Z all_storage_paths: [{mount: '/noobaa_storage', drive_id: 'overlay', storage: {total: 107320688640, free: 935012392 96}}] 2023-05-21T07:46:42.938834268Z} 2023-05-21T07:46:42.939051391Z May-21 7:46:42.938 [Agent/22] [L0] core.agent.agent_cli:: create_node_helper with path_modification noobaa_storage node: mytest- noobaa-pod-d5d0a885 current_node_path /noobaa_storage exists...... ~~~
publishedTitle: The "access_key: '123' and secret_key: 'abc'," messages are observed from the log of noobaa agent pod
